docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEW, KUO AS TO DEFENDANT BOURDONY, MICHAEL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT BOURDONY, MICHAEL
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEW, KUO COURT TRIAL SET FOR AUG-26-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK NICOLE OLCOMENDY, REPORTER BELDON YEE. MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF AUG-26-2002 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON AUG-26-2002 AT 9:45 AM IN DEPT. 602, DONALD S. MITCHELL. NO APPEARANCE FOR DEFENDANT, SENT FOR PROVE-UP.
MINUTES FOR AUG-26-2002 9:45 AM FOR DEPT 602
CASE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 602 THIS DATE FOR PROVE-UP HEARAING. PROVE UP HEARING HELD.(SEE MINUTES).

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEW, KUO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOURDONY, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 860--14TH ST. #4, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $2,407.35 RENT, $182,250.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $139.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $184,796.35, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEW, KUO
